vulnerability.reference: Over-reliance on AI agents and automation bias leads users to skip order verification.
vulnerability.generated: Shoppers' reliance on automated agent selections without real-time verification of product options enables acceptance of grounding errors.

impact.reference: Financial loss from wrong purchases and increased product returns erode consumer trust.
impact.generated: Financial loss, wasted time on returns, and eroded trust in AI shopping agents due to delivery of wrong products.

dose_response.reference: In e-commerce, grounding errors enable wrong item selection, exposing shoppers who rely on automation and skip verification to financial loss and eroded trust.
dose_response.generated: Visual and HTML grounding errors, through online shoppers' use of AI purchase agents, trigger reliance on automated selections without real-time verification, enabling acceptance of grounding errors and leading to financial loss, wasted time on returns, eroded trust from wrong products.
